name: 假千金反撲鉤
description: 在觀眾以為危機已解除時，假千金突然以系統能力反撲，製造意外的高潮轉折，將張力推向最高點。

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: Haha, Jiannanxi / You didn't expect that, did you? / You still lost to me. / My system can even defy the laws of Heaven.
